identity.name: Priya Nair
identity.headline: Chief Financial Officer | FP&A, Fundraising & Financial Controls

summary.short: CFO who took a B2B SaaS company from ₹40 crore to ₹190 crore in revenue and closed its $28M Series C.
summary.long: Finance leader with eighteen years across SaaS, retail and audit. Joined Novadesk at ₹40 crore in revenue and helped grow it past ₹190 crore, building the finance team, the forecasting model and the controls that got it through a $28M Series C. Spent the first half of her career at a Big Four firm, so she reads a balance sheet the way most people read a headline.

current_roles.title: Chief Financial Officer
highlights: Took the company through a $28M Series C, running the raise from first model to signed term sheet in four months.
Cut the monthly close from 12 days to 4 by rebuilding the reporting stack and retiring three legacy tools.
Grew gross margin from 61% to 74% over two years by repricing the enterprise tier and renegotiating cloud contracts.
Built the FP&A function from scratch — hired a team of six and put board-ready forecasting in place.
Moved audit and tax to a Big Four firm and closed three years running with no restatements.
Set up revenue recognition under Ind AS 115 ahead of Series C diligence, which cleared in one pass.

past_roles.title: VP Finance
highlights: Ran finance for a 90-store chain and brought working-capital days down from 78 to 46.
Led the SAP rollout across stores and warehouses, delivered on budget in nine months.

past_roles.title: Manager — Audit & Assurance
highlights: Signed off statutory audits for listed manufacturing and tech clients up to ₹2,000 crore in turnover.

achievements: Closed a $28M Series C and two earlier bridge rounds without diluting the founders below control.
Took gross margin from 61% to 74% and turned the company cash-flow positive a year ahead of plan.
Rebuilt month-end close to four days, giving the board numbers a week earlier every month.
Qualified as a Chartered Accountant in the top 50 nationally in her cohort.

education.field: Institute of Chartered Accountants of India

awards: CFO of the Year (SaaS), Finance Leaders Forum 2023
memberships: Institute of Chartered Accountants of India
